holdings.infoBox: SQLV is an equity ETF with a total of 323 individual holdings. The top holdings are Victory Capital Holdings stock at 1.00%, DXC Technology Company at 0.80%, Federated Hermes at 0.79%, Everforth at 0.76%, and Kyndryl Holdings at 0.74%.

overview.description: The Royce Quant Small-Cap Quality Value ETF (SQLV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed fund that uses a multi-factor scoring system to select US small-cap value stocks that are weighted based on fundamental composite scores. SQLV was launched on Jul 12, 2017 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
